Diagnosis: -Head injury with left frontal scalp hematoma and abrasion: Patient reported falling and hitting his left frontal area on 7/29, resulting in a 0.7cm mild abrasion in the left brow and subsequent swelling.
-Bilateral knee contusion: Ecchymosis was noted in bilateral knees following the fall.
-Status post cardiac valve surgery: The patient has a past medical history of cardiac valve surgery performed in 2019.
-Long-term use of anticoagulant (Pradaxa): Patient is currently under Pradaxa medication, which increases the risk of bleeding complications following head trauma.
